items.title: Russia threatens Apple with $52 million fine over alleged app discrimination

items.title: Kempower + PowerUp kick off a 12-site EV fast charging rollout
items.summary: Kempower and charge point operator PowerUp America have opened a new public DC fast charging station in Manchester, Kentucky - the first of 12 charging projects the companies are building together in the Southeast.
